title: Biomescape
description: This exploration-focused modpack introduces new biomes, custom terrain, and immersive mobs.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5Qx9YbyL5rU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# ABOUT THIS MODPACK
Using [Additive](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive) as a base, Biomescape introduces you as a explorer, ready to explore the new world that is waiting for you. Are you ready to be amazed by how big in scope some structures and biomes are? If you are like me and enjoy dungeon crawlers then I am happy to inform you that this modpack includes epic dungeons that are not impossible to find. Outside of the exploration aspect there is some smaller details sprinkled on top like being able to damage mobs in tall grass areas.   

# FEATURES
- Immersive Biomes 🌲
- [Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) ✨
- Immmersive Structures 🏰
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) 🧭
- Optional Clean UI 
- QoL Features ✍
- [World Host](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) 🌐
- Immersive Mobs 🐺
- [Overhauled Camera](https://modrinth.com/mod/shoulder-surfing-reloaded) 🎥

# SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
Minimum: A system capable of running  [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
